name: sms
description: Multi-tenant school management system for Myanmar schools.

scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-banner.mjs && concurrently -k -n api,web,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @sms/api" "npm run dev -w @sms/web" "npm run dev -w @sms/worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sms/shared && npm run build -w @sms/api && npm run build -w @sms/web && npm run build -w @sms/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @sms/shared && npm run typecheck -w @sms/api && npm run typecheck -w @sms/web && npm run typecheck -w @sms/worker && npm run typecheck -w @sms/shared
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean:web && npm run dev
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
